ksa_text: Knowledge of specific data domain context, including business purpose, system sources, consumer use cases, data lineage, and applicable regulatory classifications.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of applicable laws (e.g., Electronic Communications Privacy Act, Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act, Protect America Act, search and seizure laws, civil liberties and privacy laws), statutes (e.g., in Titles 10, 18, 32, 50 in U.S. Code), Presidential Directives, executive branch guidelines, and/or administrative/criminal legal guidelines and procedures relevant to work performed.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Categorization of the AI system is performed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-K-009 (Data Governance) scores 0.435 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Warehouse Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.435 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Governance KSA DG-K-009 as a discrete competency for Data Warehouse Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Data Warehouse Architect market data. Governance content is policy/program management, not warehouse architecture. Score 0.435 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Governance content is policy/program management, not warehouse architecture. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Governance content is policy/program management, not warehouse architecture.
